info.title: NMD Canonical Management & Query API
info.description:
REST API for the NMD Product Canonical module. Provides lifecycle management of canonical instrument records (create, update, status change) and read-only query access (lookup by canonical key and attribute search). This is the authoritative identity layer for all NMD ingestion, normalisation, and export modules.

Source FRD: FRD-NMD-0001 — Product Canonical Management & Query
Maintenance spec: PSD-0001
Query spec: PSD-0002

tags.name: Canonical Maintenance
tags.description: Create, update, and manage status of canonical instrument records (PSD-0001)

tags.name: Canonical Query
tags.description: Read-only lookup and attribute search of canonical records (PSD-0002)

post.summary: Create a new canonical instrument record
post.description:
Creates a new canonical instrument record. The canonical key is computed by the system as a deterministic hash of the 5 hierarchy columns. Initial status is supplied by the caller (Data Owner) or taken from source configuration (Source Processing). Duplicate canonical keys are rejected.

Ref: PSD-0001 CRUD — Create

400.description: Validation error — e.g. missing exchange, invalid entity type, duplicate canonical key

403.description: Forbidden — caller role does not have create permission

409.description: Conflict — canonical record with this key already exists

get.summary: Lookup canonical record by canonical key
get.description:
Returns the full canonical record for the given canonical key, subject to the caller's role-based status filter. By default only Active records are returned. Data Owner and Data Ingestion Module may also retrieve Inactive and Disabled records. Query & Export Module may never retrieve Disabled records.

Ref: PSD-0002 Flow A

parameters.name: canonical_key
parameters.description: The deterministic hash key identifying the canonical record

parameters.name: status_filter
parameters.description: Optional status filter. Permitted values depend on caller role. Query & Export Module may not request Disabled.

400.description: Bad request — e.g. empty canonical_key or disallowed status_filter for caller role

put.summary: Update non-locked fields of a canonical record
put.description:
Updates the non-locked fields of an existing canonical record. The 5 hierarchy columns (exchange, commodity, product_type, product_code, contract), asset_class, entity_type, and canonical_key are immutable after creation and are rejected if included. Only status is editable via this endpoint — see PATCH /canonical/{canonical_key}/status for status lifecycle changes.

Ref: PSD-0001 CRUD — Update

parameters.name: canonical_key
parameters.description: The canonical key of the record to update

400.description: Validation error — e.g. attempt to modify locked fields

403.description: Forbidden — caller role does not have update permission

patch.summary: Change the status of a canonical record
patch.description:
Changes the status of a canonical record and triggers a top-down cascade to all non-Disabled descendants. A child record cannot be set to a status more permissive than its parent. One canonical.status.changed event is emitted per affected record (including cascade-triggered descendants).

Ref: PSD-0001 CRUD — Status Change; AEC-0003

parameters.name: canonical_key
parameters.description: The canonical key of the record whose status to change

200.description: Status changed successfully. Response includes the updated record; cascade to descendants is async.

400.description: Validation error — e.g. child status more permissive than parent

403.description: Forbidden — caller role does not have status change permission

get.description:
Searches the canonical entity table by one or more attributes. At least one attribute must be provided — open-ended queries with no filter are not permitted. Contract ticker search uses prefix match only. Results are sorted Active → Inactive → Disabled, then by exchange, commodity, product_type, product_code. Paginated — default page size 50, maximum 2000.

Ref: PSD-0002 Flow B

parameters.name: product_type
parameters.description: Exact match on product type (Futures & Options only)

parameters.name: contract
parameters.description: Prefix match on contract ticker — contains and suffix match not supported in Phase 1

parameters.name: status_filter
parameters.description: Optional status filter — role-dependent; Query & Export Module may not request Disabled

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Page size — default 50, maximum 2000. Requests exceeding 2000 are capped at 2000.

400.description: Bad request — e.g. no search attributes provided, or disallowed status_filter for caller role

CanonicalRecord.description: A canonical instrument record — the authoritative identity for one unique financial instrument in NMD

canonical_key.description: Deterministic hash of the 5 hierarchy columns — immutable after creation

exchange.description: Exchange identifier. For FX records: fixed value 'FX'

commodity.description: Commodity identifier. For FX Currency Pair: XXXYYY format (6 uppercase characters). Null for L1 entity types.

product_type.description: Product type — Futures & Options only. Null for FX and entity types below L3.

product_code.description: Product code — null for entity types below L3 and all FX records

contract.description: Contract ticker. For Option Contract: YYYYMM_CP_STRIKE | YYYYMMDD_CP_STRIKE | YYYYMMWN_CP_STRIKE. Null for non-contract entity types and all FX records.

entity_type.description: Entity type — must be valid for the selected asset class. Immutable after creation.

source.description: Creation actor — 'User' or source processing identifier

CanonicalRecordCreateRequest.description: Request body for creating a new canonical record

exchange.description: Exchange identifier. Use 'FX' for FX records.

commodity.description: Commodity identifier. Required for entity types above L1. FX: XXXYYY format.

product_type.description: Product type — Futures & Options L3+ only. Must be null for FX.

product_code.description: Product code — L3+ only. Must be null for FX.

contract.description: Contract ticker — contract-level entity types only. Must be null for FX.

entity_type.description: Entity type — must be valid for the selected asset class

status.description: Initial status. Source Processing: taken from source configuration — never defaulted.

CanonicalRecordUpdateRequest.description: Request body for updating non-locked fields of a canonical record. The 5 hierarchy columns, asset_class, entity_type, and canonical_key may not be included — locked after creation.

status.description: Use PATCH /canonical/{canonical_key}/status for status changes with cascade semantics. Included here for completeness — direct status update without cascade is not the canonical path.

StatusChangeRequest.description: Request body for changing the status of a canonical record

new_status.description: The target status. Child record status cannot be more permissive than parent status.

data.description: Matching canonical records — sorted Active → Inactive → Disabled, then by exchange, commodity, product_type, product_code

x-change-log.author: Leo
x-change-log.description: Initial draft — covers POST /canonical (create), PUT /canonical/{key} (update), PATCH /canonical/{key}/status (status change with cascade), GET /canonical/{key} (lookup), GET /canonical/search (attribute search with prefix match on contract, pagination 50/2000, fixed sort order)
